# google_ces_evaluation

Customer Engagement Suite Evaluation

~> **Warning:** This resource is in beta, and should be used with the terraform-provider-google-beta provider.
See [Provider Versions](../guides/provider_versions.html.markdown) for more details on beta resources.

To get more information about Evaluation, see:

* [API documentation](https://docs.cloud.google.com/customer-engagement-ai/conversational-agents/ps/reference/rest/v1beta/projects.locations.apps.evaluations)

<div class = "oics-button" style="float: right; margin: 0 0 -15px">
  <a href="https://console.cloud.google.com/cloudshell/open?cloudshell_git_repo=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fterraform-google-modules%2Fdocs-examples.git&cloudshell_image=gcr.io%2Fcloudshell-images%2Fcloudshell%3Alatest&cloudshell_print=.%2Fmotd&cloudshell_tutorial=.%2Ftutorial.md&cloudshell_working_dir=ces_evaluation_basic&open_in_editor=main.tf" target="_blank">

## Example Usage - Ces Evaluation Basic


```hcl
resource "google_ces_app" "app" {
  provider = google-beta
  app_id = "app-id"
  location = "us"
  display_name = "my-app"

  language_settings {
    default_language_code    = "en-US"
  }
  time_zone_settings {
    time_zone = "America/Los_Angeles"
  }
}

resource "google_ces_evaluation" "ces_evaluation_basic" {
  provider = google-beta
  evaluation_id = "eval-basic"
  display_name = "my-evaluation-basic"
  location     = "us"
  app          = google_ces_app.app.app_id
}
```
<div class = "oics-button" style="float: right; margin: 0 0 -15px">
  <a href="https://console.cloud.google.com/cloudshell/open?cloudshell_git_repo=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fterraform-google-modules%2Fdocs-examples.git&cloudshell_image=gcr.io%2Fcloudshell-images%2Fcloudshell%3Alatest&cloudshell_print=.%2Fmotd&cloudshell_tutorial=.%2Ftutorial.md&cloudshell_working_dir=ces_evaluation_full&open_in_editor=main.tf" target="_blank">
    <img alt="Open in Cloud Shell" src="//gstatic.com/cloudssh/images/open-btn.svg" style="max-height: 44px; margin: 32px auto; max-width: 100%;">
  </a>
</div>
## Example Usage - Ces Evaluation Full


```hcl
resource "google_ces_app" "app" {
  provider = google-beta
  app_id = "app-id-full"
  location = "us"
  display_name = "my-app-full"

  language_settings {
    default_language_code    = "en-US"
  }
  time_zone_settings {
    time_zone = "America/Los_Angeles"
  }
}

resource "google_ces_tool" "tool" {
  provider = google-beta
  location       = "us"
  app            = google_ces_app.app.app_id
  tool_id        = "tool-id-full"
  execution_type = "SYNCHRONOUS"
  python_function {
      name = "example_function"
      python_code = "def example_function() -> int: return 0"
  }
}

resource "google_ces_evaluation" "ces_evaluation_full" {
  provider = google-beta
  evaluation_id = "evaluation-id-full"
  display_name = "my-evaluation-full"
  location     = "us"
  app          = google_ces_app.app.app_id
  description  = "Full evaluation for testing"
  tags         = ["test", "full"]

  golden {
    evaluation_expectations = ["projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/evaluationExpectations/dummy-exp"]

    turns {
      steps {
        user_input {
          text = "Hello"
          will_continue = true
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          variables = {
            key = "value"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect tool call"
          tool_call {
            id = "tool-call-id"
            tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
            args = {
              param = "value"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect agent response"
          agent_response {
            role = "agent"
            chunks {
              updated_variables = { "key": "value" }
            }
            chunks {
              agent_transfer {
                target_agent = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/agents/dummy-agent"
              }
            }
            chunks {
              tool_call {
                id = "tool-call-id-3"
                tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
              }
            }
            chunks {
              tool_response {
                id = "tool-call-id-3"
                response = { result = "success" }
                tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect toolset tool call"
          tool_call {
            id = "tool-call-id-2"
            toolset_tool {
              toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
              tool_id = "dummy-tool"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        agent_transfer {
          target_agent = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/agents/dummy-agent"
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          agent_transfer {
            target_agent = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/agents/dummy-agent"
            display_name = "dummy-agent"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect mock tool response"
          mock_tool_response {
            id = "tool-call-id-4"
            response = { result = "mocked" }
            tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect tool response"
          tool_response {
            toolset_tool {
              toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
              tool_id = "dummy-tool"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect updated variables"
          updated_variables {
            notes = "Some notes"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          tool_responses {
            tool_responses {
              id = "tool-call-id-5"
              response = { result = "user-provided" }
              tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          event {
            event = "my-event"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          dtmf = "1234"
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          audio = "c29tZSBhdWRpbyBkYXRh" # base64 for "some audio data"
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          blob {
            mime_type = "text/plain"
            data = "c29tZSBibG9iIGRhdGE=" # base64 for "some blob data"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          image {
            mime_type = "image/png"
            data = "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAAAAAA6fptVAAAACklEQVR42mNk+A8AAQUBAScY42YAAAAASUVORK5CYII=" # valid 1x1 pixel PNG base64
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          tool_responses {
            tool_responses {
              id = "tool-call-id"
              response = {
                result = "success"
              }
              tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect tool response"
          tool_response {
            id = "tool-call-id"
            response = {
              result = "success"
            }
            tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect agent response with chunks"
          agent_response {
            role = "agent"
            chunks {
              text = "Hello again"
            }
            chunks {
              text = "Hello again transcript"
            }

            chunks {
              blob {
                mime_type = "text/plain"
                data = "c29tZSBibG9iIGRhdGE="
              }
            }
            chunks {
              image {
                mime_type = "image/png"
                data = "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAAAAAA6fptVAAAACklEQVR42mNk+A8AAQUBAScY42YAAAAASUVORK5CYII="
              }
            }
            chunks {
              tool_call {
                id = "tool-call-id-3"
                tool = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/tools/${google_ces_tool.tool.tool_id}"
                args = {
                  param = "value"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
<div class = "oics-button" style="float: right; margin: 0 0 -15px">
  <a href="https://console.cloud.google.com/cloudshell/open?cloudshell_git_repo=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fterraform-google-modules%2Fdocs-examples.git&cloudshell_image=gcr.io%2Fcloudshell-images%2Fcloudshell%3Alatest&cloudshell_print=.%2Fmotd&cloudshell_tutorial=.%2Ftutorial.md&cloudshell_working_dir=ces_evaluation_toolset&open_in_editor=main.tf" target="_blank">
    <img alt="Open in Cloud Shell" src="//gstatic.com/cloudssh/images/open-btn.svg" style="max-height: 44px; margin: 32px auto; max-width: 100%;">
  </a>
</div>
## Example Usage - Ces Evaluation Toolset


```hcl
resource "google_ces_app" "app" {
  provider = google-beta
  app_id = "app-id-toolset"
  location = "us"
  display_name = "my-app-toolset"

  language_settings {
    default_language_code    = "en-US"
  }
  time_zone_settings {
    time_zone = "America/Los_Angeles"
  }
}

resource "google_ces_evaluation" "ces_evaluation_toolset" {
  provider = google-beta
  evaluation_id = "eval-toolset"
  display_name = "my-evaluation-toolset"
  location     = "us"
  app          = google_ces_app.app.app_id

  golden {
    turns {
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect agent response with toolset tool call"
          agent_response {
            role = "agent"
            chunks {
              tool_call {
                id = "tool-call-id"
                toolset_tool {
                  toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
                  tool_id = "dummy-tool"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect agent response with toolset tool response"
          agent_response {
            role = "agent"
            chunks {
              tool_response {
                id = "tool-call-id"
                response = { result = "success" }
                toolset_tool {
                  toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
                  tool_id = "dummy-tool"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        expectation {
          note = "Expect mock tool response with toolset tool"
          mock_tool_response {
            id = "tool-call-id-2"
            response = { result = "mocked" }
            toolset_tool {
              toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
              tool_id = "dummy-tool"
            }
          }
        }
      }
      steps {
        user_input {
          tool_responses {
            tool_responses {
              id = "tool-call-id-3"
              response = { result = "user-provided" }
              toolset_tool {
                toolset = "projects/${google_ces_app.app.project}/locations/us/apps/${google_ces_app.app.app_id}/toolsets/dummy-toolset"
                tool_id = "dummy-tool"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:


* `display_name` -
  (Required)
  User-defined display name of the evaluation.

* `location` -
  (Required)

* `app` -
  (Required)

* `evaluation_id` -
  (Required)
  The ID to use for the evaluation, which will become the final component of
  the evaluation's resource name. If not provided, a unique ID will be
  automatically assigned for the evaluation.


* `description` -
  (Optional)
  User-defined description of the evaluation.

* `tags` -
  (Optional)
  User defined tags to categorize the evaluation.

* `golden` -
  (Optional)
  Golden input.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden).

* `project` - (Optional) The ID of the project in which the resource belongs.
    If it is not provided, the provider project is used.



<a name="nested_golden"></a>The `golden` block supports:

* `turns` -
  (Required)
  The golden turns required to replay a golden conversation.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns).

* `evaluation_expectations` -
  (Optional)
  The evaluation expectations to evaluate the replayed conversation against. Format: projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apps/{app}/evaluationExpectations/{evaluationExpectation}


<a name="nested_golden_turns"></a>The `turns` block supports:

* `root_span` -
  (Output)
  The root span of the golden turn for processing and maintaining audio information.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_root_span).

* `steps` -
  (Required)
  The sequence of steps required to replay a golden conversation turn.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_root_span"></a>The `root_span` block contains:

* `name` -
  (Output)
  Output only. The name of the span.

* `start_time` -
  (Output)
  Output only. The start time of the span.

* `end_time` -
  (Output)
  Output only. The end time of the span.

* `duration` -
  (Output)
  Output only. The duration of the span.

* `attributes` -
  (Output)
  Output only. Key-value attributes associated with the span.

* `child_spans` -
  (Output)
  Output only. The child spans that are nested under this span.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps"></a>The `steps` block supports:

* `user_input` -
  (Optional)
  Represents user input for the conversation. Note: 'user_input' and 'expectation' are mutually exclusive.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input).

* `agent_transfer` -
  (Optional)
  Represents an event indicating the transfer of the conversation to a different agent.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_agent_transfer).

* `expectation` -
  (Optional)
  Executes an expectation on the current turn to verify the agent's behavior. Note: 'user_input' and 'expectation' are mutually exclusive.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input"></a>The `user_input` block supports:

* `text` -
  (Optional)
  Natural language query.

* `dtmf` -
  (Optional)
  DTMF digits from the end user.

* `audio` -
  (Optional)
  Audio data from the end user.

* `tool_responses` -
  (Optional)
  The list of tool execution results.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses).

* `image` -
  (Optional)
  Image data from the end user.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_image).

* `blob` -
  (Optional)
  Blob data from the end user.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_blob).

* `variables` -
  (Optional)
  Map of variables to set.

* `event` -
  (Optional)
  An event to be sent to the session.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_event).

* `will_continue` -
  (Optional)
  Whether the session should continue.


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses"></a>The `tool_responses` block supports:

* `tool_responses` -
  (Optional)
  The list of tool execution results.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses_tool_responses).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses_tool_responses"></a>The `tool_responses` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  Optional. Matching ID of the tool call.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Output only. Display name of the tool.

* `response` -
  (Required)
  Required. The tool execution result in JSON.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  Name of the tool to execute.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  The toolset tool that got executed.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses_tool_responses_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_tool_responses_tool_responses_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The toolset name.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_image"></a>The `image` block supports:

* `mime_type` -
  (Required)
  The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

* `data` -
  (Required)
  Raw bytes of the image, base64-encoded.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_blob"></a>The `blob` block supports:

* `mime_type` -
  (Required)
  The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

* `data` -
  (Required)
  Raw bytes of the blob, base64-encoded.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_user_input_event"></a>The `event` block supports:

* `event` -
  (Required)
  Event name.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_agent_transfer"></a>The `agent_transfer` block supports:

* `target_agent` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the target agent.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  The display name of the target agent.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation"></a>The `expectation` block supports:

* `note` -
  (Optional)
  A note describing the expectation.

* `tool_call` -
  (Optional)
  Expectation on tool call.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_call).

* `tool_response` -
  (Optional)
  Expectation on tool response.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_response).

* `agent_response` -
  (Optional)
  Expectation on agent response.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response).

* `agent_transfer` -
  (Optional)
  Expectation on agent transfer.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_transfer).

* `updated_variables` -
  (Optional)
  Expectation on updated variables.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_updated_variables).

* `mock_tool_response` -
  (Optional)
  A mock response to provide if a tool is called.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_mock_tool_response).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_call"></a>The `tool_call` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  The unique identifier of the tool call.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the tool.

* `args` -
  (Optional)
  The input parameters and values for the tool in JSON object format.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the tool. Note: 'tool' and 'toolset_tool' are mutually exclusive.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  A tool that is created from a toolset. Note: 'tool' and 'toolset_tool' are mutually exclusive.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_call_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_call_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the Toolset.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID to filter the tools to retrieve the schema for.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_response"></a>The `tool_response` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  The matching ID of the tool call the response is for.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the tool.

* `response` -
  (Optional)
  The tool execution result in JSON object format.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the tool.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  A tool that is created from a toolset.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_response_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_tool_response_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the Toolset.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID to filter the tools to retrieve the schema for.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response"></a>The `agent_response` block supports:

* `role` -
  (Optional)
  The role within the conversation, e.g., user, agent.

* `chunks` -
  (Optional)
  Content of the message as a series of chunks.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks"></a>The `chunks` block supports:

* `text` -
  (Optional)
  Text data.

* `updated_variables` -
  (Optional)
  Updated variables in JSON object format.

* `blob` -
  (Optional)
  Represents a blob input or output in the conversation.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_blob).

* `image` -
  (Optional)
  Represents an image input or output in the conversation.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_image).

* `tool_call` -
  (Optional)
  Request for the client or the agent to execute the specified tool.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_call).

* `tool_response` -
  (Optional)
  The execution result of a specific tool from the client or the agent.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_response).

* `agent_transfer` -
  (Optional)
  Represents an event indicating the transfer of a conversation to a different agent.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_agent_transfer).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_blob"></a>The `blob` block supports:

* `mime_type` -
  (Required)
  The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

* `data` -
  (Required)
  Raw bytes of the blob.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_image"></a>The `image` block supports:

* `mime_type` -
  (Required)
  The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

* `data` -
  (Required)
  Raw bytes of the image.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_call"></a>The `tool_call` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  The unique identifier of the tool call.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the tool.

* `args` -
  (Optional)
  The input parameters and values for the tool in JSON object format.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the tool.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  A tool that is created from a toolset.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_call_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_call_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the Toolset.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID to filter the tools to retrieve the schema for.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_response"></a>The `tool_response` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  The matching ID of the tool call the response is for.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the tool.

* `response` -
  (Optional)
  The tool execution result in JSON object format.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the tool.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  A tool that is created from a toolset.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_response_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_tool_response_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the Toolset.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID to filter the tools to retrieve the schema for.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_response_chunks_agent_transfer"></a>The `agent_transfer` block supports:

* `target_agent` -
  (Required)
  The agent to which the conversation is being transferred.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the agent.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_agent_transfer"></a>The `agent_transfer` block supports:

* `target_agent` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the target agent.

* `display_name` -
  (Optional)
  The display name of the target agent.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_updated_variables"></a>The `updated_variables` block supports:

* `notes` -
  (Optional)
  Dummy property.

<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_mock_tool_response"></a>The `mock_tool_response` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Optional)
  The matching ID of the tool call the response is for.

* `display_name` -
  (Output)
  Display name of the tool.

* `response` -
  (Optional)
  The tool execution result in JSON object format.

* `tool` -
  (Optional)
  The resource name of the tool.

* `toolset_tool` -
  (Optional)
  A tool that is created from a toolset.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_mock_tool_response_toolset_tool).


<a name="nested_golden_turns_steps_expectation_mock_tool_response_toolset_tool"></a>The `toolset_tool` block supports:

* `toolset` -
  (Required)
  The resource name of the Toolset.

* `tool_id` -
  (Optional)
  The tool ID to filter the tools to retrieve the schema for.

## Attributes Reference

In addition to the arguments listed above, the following computed attributes are exported:

* `id` - an identifier for the resource with format `projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/apps/{{app}}/evaluations/{{evaluation_id}}`

* `name` -
  Identifier. The unique identifier of the evaluation.
  Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apps/{app}/evaluations/{evaluation}`

* `evaluation_datasets` -
  List of evaluation datasets the evaluation belongs to.

* `create_time` -
  Timestamp when the evaluation was created.

* `created_by` -
  The user who created the evaluation.

* `update_time` -
  Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated.

* `last_updated_by` -
  The user who last updated the evaluation.

* `evaluation_runs` -
  The evaluation runs for this evaluation.

* `etag` -
  Etag used to ensure the object hasn't changed during a read-modify-write operation.

* `invalid` -
  Whether the evaluation is invalid.


## Timeouts

This resource provides the following
[Timeouts](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/plugin/sdkv2/resources/retries-and-customizable-timeouts) configuration options:

- `create` - Default is 20 minutes.
- `update` - Default is 20 minutes.
- `delete` - Default is 20 minutes.

## Import


Evaluation can be imported using any of these accepted formats:

* `projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/apps/{{app}}/evaluations/{{evaluation_id}}`
* `{{project}}/{{location}}/{{app}}/{{evaluation_id}}`
* `{{location}}/{{app}}/{{evaluation_id}}`

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, use an [`identity` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/identities) to import Evaluation using identity values. For example:

```tf
import {
  identity = {
    location = "<-required value->"
    app = "<-required value->"
    evaluationId = "<-required value->"
    project = "<-optional value->"
  }
  to = google_ces_evaluation.default
}
```

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) to import Evaluation using one of the formats above. For example:

```tf
import {
  id = "projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/apps/{{app}}/evaluations/{{evaluation_id}}"
  to = google_ces_evaluation.default
}
```

When using the [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import), Evaluation can be imported using one of the formats above. For example:

```
$ terraform import google_ces_evaluation.default projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/apps/{{app}}/evaluations/{{evaluation_id}}
$ terraform import google_ces_evaluation.default {{project}}/{{location}}/{{app}}/{{evaluation_id}}
$ terraform import google_ces_evaluation.default {{location}}/{{app}}/{{evaluation_id}}
```

## User Project Overrides

This resource supports [User Project Overrides](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/google/latest/docs/guides/provider_reference#user_project_override).
